flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Grand View University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.9k → $34.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Grand View University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.9k → $34.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Grand View University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Grand View University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (39.5% → 45.4%).
